steps.title: Spot the structure's turning point
steps.content: The word Still at the start of the final sentence marks the passage's shift from introducing and explaining benefits of a customization trend to presenting a challenge companies face.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D names the trend (customization) and correctly identifies that the passage explains both its benefits (companies profit, consumers willing to pay more) and its challenges (difficulty keeping costs low).

The other three misidentify the passage's content—focusing on manufacturing innovations, a company's success story, or marketing techniques—none of which appear here.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
